subcodes.first_line: Verily, in the departure of the Ancient Beauty from the Land of Mystery and His entrance into the Most Great Prison are signs unto the nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان فی خروج جمال القدم من ارض السر و دخوله فی الحبس الاعظم لایات للامم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
